chunks.title: Give and Receive
chunks.reason: Instruction on giving and receiving blessings.

chunks.title: Good and Evil
chunks.reason: Parable about the goodness of giving and the father's generosity.

chunks.title: The Golden Rule
chunks.reason: Summary of ethical behavior as a single principle.

chunks.title: The Narrow Gate
chunks.reason: Metaphor about the path to life and its difficulty.

chunks.title: Watch for False Prophets
chunks.reason: Warning about identifying false prophets by their fruit.

chunks.title: The Importance of Deeds
chunks.reason: Teaching on the necessity of actions over words.

chunks.title: The Wise and Foolish Builders
chunks.reason: Parable contrasting wise and foolish foundations.

chunks.title: Jesus' Teaching and the Crowd's Reaction
chunks.reason: Narrative of Jesus' teaching and the crowd's response.
